sections.title: Past Simple (from slides)
sections.rule: Фразы из скринов по Past Simple.

examples.en: I didn't know about it
I didn't have time
I didn't like this idea at first
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt laɪk ðɪs aɪˈdɪə æt fɜːst]
examples.ru: Мне не понравилась эта идея сначала

examples.en: I didn't like this idea in the beginning
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt laɪk ðɪs aɪˈdɪə ɪn ðə bɪˈgɪnɪŋ]
examples.ru: Мне не понравилась эта идея в начале

examples.en: I didn't like it at first
I didn't like it in the beginning
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt laɪk ɪt ɪn ðə bɪˈgɪnɪŋ]
examples.ru: Мне не понравилось это в начале

examples.en: I didn't pay for it
I didn't want to do it
I didn't want to go there
They didn't lose
We didn't understand it
He didn't want to work there
She didn't want to spend time on it
examples.ipa: [ʃiː dɪdnt wɒnt tuː spend taɪm ɒn ɪt]
examples.ru: Она не хотела тратить время на это

examples.en: I didn't want to spend my time on it
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt wɒnt tuː spend maɪ taɪm ɒn ɪt]
examples.ru: Я не хотел тратить свое время на это

examples.en: It didn't happen
I didn't have any questions
examples.ru: У меня не было каких-либо вопросов

examples.en: I didn't make any mistakes
I didn't have any problems
examples.ru: У меня не было каких-либо проблем

examples.en: He didn't go to school yesterday
examples.ru: Он не ходил в школу вчера

examples.en: I didn't go to work two days ago
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt gəʊ tuː wɜːk tuː deɪz əˈgəʊ]
examples.ru: Я не ходил на работу два дня назад

examples.en: I didn't drink tea. I drank coffee
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt drɪŋk tiː. aɪ dræŋk ˈkɒfi]
examples.ru: Я не пил чай. Я выпил кофе

examples.en: I didn't go there. I went to another place
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt gəʊ ðeə. aɪ went tuː əˈnʌðə pleɪs]
examples.ru: Я не ходил туда. Я пошел в другое место

examples.en: I didn't go shopping
She didn't go shopping yesterday
examples.ru: Она не ходила по магазинам вчера

examples.en: She didn't look happy
He didn't understand this lesson
It didn't help me
This thing didn't help us
I didn't think about it seriously
examples.ru: Я не думал об этом всерьез

examples.en: It didn't bring him big money
examples.ru: Это не принесло ему больших денег

examples.en: It didn't bring him success and happiness
examples.ipa: [ɪt dɪdnt brɪŋ hɪm səkˈses ænd ˈhæpɪnɪs]
examples.ru: Это не принесло ему успех и счастье

examples.en: It didn't bring her real happiness
examples.ru: Это не принесло ей настоящее счастье

examples.en: I didn't have enough time
examples.ru: У меня не было достаточно времени

examples.en: He didn't have enough money
examples.ru: У него не было достаточно денег

examples.en: I didn't like that hotel
I didn't watch this movie
I didn't watch this video
He didn't ask me about it
examples.ru: Он не спрашивал меня об этом

examples.en: I didn't want to wait
I didn't want to wait for it
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt wɒnt tuː weɪt fɔː ɪt]

examples.en: I didn't believe him at first
I didn't believe it in the beginning
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt bɪˈliːv ɪt ɪn ðə bɪˈgɪnɪŋ]
examples.ru: Я не поверил этому в начале

examples.en: I didn't want to be late for the lesson
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt wɒnt tuː biː leɪt fɔː ðə ˈlesn]
examples.ru: Я не хотел опаздывать на урок

examples.en: I didn't want to be late for the concert
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt wɒnt tuː biː leɪt fɔː ðə ˈkɒnsət]
examples.ru: Я не хотел опаздывать на концерт

examples.en: I didn't find it
I didn't find this information
I didn't go for a walk yesterday
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt gəʊ fɔː ə wɔːk ˈjestədeɪ]
examples.ru: Я не ходил на прогулку вчера

examples.en: She didn't feel happy
I didn't want to be late
I didn't want to be late for the meeting
examples.ipa: [aɪ dɪdnt wɒnt tuː biː leɪt fɔː ðə ˈmiːtɪŋ]
examples.ru: Я не хотел опаздывать на встречу
